featureRequests.title: Bulk upload deliverables via CSV
featureRequests.description: Allow brands to upload a CSV of deliverable briefs so they can spin up dozens of tasks at once instead of creating them one by one.

featureRequests.title: Provider availability calendar
featureRequests.description: Let providers set their available hours and vacation days so brands can see who is free before assigning work.

featureRequests.title: Automatic invoice generation
featureRequests.description: Generate invoices automatically when deliverables are marked as approved, pulling in the agreed rate and payment terms.

featureRequests.title: Dark mode for the dashboard
featureRequests.description: Add a dark color scheme option for the main dashboard to reduce eye strain during late-night work sessions.

featureRequests.title: In-app messaging between brands and providers
featureRequests.description: A simple chat feature so brands and providers can communicate inside the platform without switching to email or Slack.

featureRequests.title: Custom branded deliverable templates
featureRequests.description: Let brands save reusable deliverable templates with pre-filled descriptions, tags, and requirements to speed up recurring tasks.

featureRequests.title: Provider portfolio showcase page
featureRequests.description: Give providers a public-facing portfolio page where they can display past work samples and testimonials.

featureRequests.title: Webhook notifications for deliverable status changes
featureRequests.description: Fire webhooks when deliverables move between statuses so teams can integrate Bloom events into their own tooling and Slack channels.
